Half Page Flyer

Download and share our half page flyer to let others know about the protests happening at or near the Burlington MA detention center. This flyer is designed to be printed on standard 8.5 x 11 paper and cut in half, creating a convenient half-page handout. It's perfect for sharing at community events, protests, or simply leaving in public spaces to raise awareness about the detention center.

Download 8.5 x 11 PDF (2 per page)
